title: Paris Interlude
writer: Wells Root, S.J. Perelman, Laura Perelman
actors: Madge Evans, Otto Kruger, Robert Young
plot: Julie has a star-crossed romance with Sam, leaning on pal Cassie when unhappy. When Sam is believed dead, Cassie urges Julie to take up with good guy Pat. When Sam returns, Cassie tries to do the right thing by her best friend.
